snippet.title: The POTA Performers: Creating Awesome Parks On The Air Experiences! Activation Adventures With AC1RH
snippet.description:
Welcome to another episode of The POTA Performers! In this video, I sit down with Keith (AC1RH), a highly active amateur radio operator from New Hampshire, to talk about our shared passion for Parks on the Air (POTA).

Whether you are a seasoned chaser or looking to plan your first park activation, Keith brings a ton of energy to the hobby, constantly looking for new ways of creating awesome POTA experiences. We dive into his rapid journey into ham radio and the creative, adventurous ways he gets on the air.

In This Episode, We Discuss:

From Zero Radio Background to Extra Class: How Keith entered the hobby with no prior electronics background and quickly leveled up his license.

The Daily Activator: His transition from hunting to activating, how having the time to get out daily fuels his passion, and his current mission to "kilo" unique parks to keep things fresh.

Extreme POTA Adventures: Battling strong tidal currents to kayak to Eagle Island in Massachusetts, plus an exclusive preview of his upcoming Aeronautical Mobile activation from a small airplane!

Advice for the Pileup: Why hunters should know about his "run-and-gun" operating style, and why he asks for patience if you're looking for a longer ragchew.

Crucial Tips for New Activators: Why your own backyard is the most important testing ground, and the necessity of triple-checking your gear before heading off the grid.

We wrap up by talking about the incredible, positive impact POTA is having on amateur radio—getting operators outdoors and breathing new life into the community.

Drop a comment below: What's the most extreme or unique location you've activated or hunted?

Don't forget to Like, Subscribe, and hit the bell for more amateur radio adventures!

73 from VE9CF and AC1RH!

#HamRadio #AmateurRadio #POTA #ParksOnTheAir #AC1RH #VE9CF #HamRadioOutdoors #RadioCommunication

snippet.title: We will not be renewing the general license on Russian and Iranian oil: Bessent
snippet.description:
The United States will not be renewing the waivers that allowed purchase of some Iranian and Russian oil without facing U.S. sanctions, Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent told reporters on Wednesday (April 15).

"We will not be renewing the general license on Russian oil, and we will not be renewing the general license on Iranian oil. That was oil that was on the water prior to March 11. So all that has been used," Bessent said at a White House briefing.

The moves signal an end to the Trump administration's efforts to use the sanctions waivers to free up more oil supplies and lower soaring global energy prices.

The Iranian waiver, which the Treasury Department issued on March 20, allowed some 140 million barrels of oil to ​reach global markets and helped relieve pressure on energy supply during the war, Bessent said last month. The waiver is set ​to expire on April 19.

snippet.title: US Ends Oil Waiver: Big Impact on India? भारत को US का बड़ा झटका रूस-ईरान से तेल खरीद बंद
snippet.description:
मिडिल ईस्ट में बढ़ते तनाव के बीच United States ने बड़ा फैसला लिया है. अमेरिका ने रूस और ईरान से तेल खरीदने पर दी गई अस्थायी छूट को आगे बढ़ाने से इनकार कर दिया है.
अमेरिकी वित्त मंत्री Scott Bessent ने साफ किया कि रूसी और ईरानी तेल के लिए जारी सामान्य लाइसेंस का नवीनीकरण नहीं होगा. जो तेल पहले ही शिपमेंट में था, उसकी बिक्री की अनुमति थी, लेकिन अब वह स्टॉक खत्म हो चुका है. मार्च में अमेरिका ने 30 दिन की छूट दी थी ताकि वैश्विक बाजार में सप्लाई बनी रहे और कीमतों पर दबाव कम हो. अब इस फैसले का असर भारत जैसे देशों पर पड़ सकता है, जो सस्ते रूसी तेल पर निर्भर रहे हैं.

क्या इससे भारत में पेट्रोल-डीजल की कीमतों पर असर पड़ेगा? जानिए पूरी रिपोर्ट.

The United States has refused to extend the temporary waiver allowing purchases of Russian and Iranian oil. This decision could impact countries like India that rely on discounted crude imports. Here’s a clear breakdown of what changed, why it matters, and how global oil markets may react.

snippet.description:
What does CQ actually mean? 
CQ is a universal ham radio term that stands for a general call — it basically means: "Hey, I'm here and looking for ANY station to talk to!"
 It's your way to throw your signal out into the airwaves and invite anyone listening to respond and make a contact (QSO). 
Whether you're a fresh ASOC license holder or just starting out, mastering the CQ call is your gateway to making worldwide contacts. Get ready to go on the air — your first QSO is closer than you think.
#HamRadio #AmateurRadio #CQCall #HamBeginner

snippet.title: GRANDPA'S HAM RADIO PICKS UP A SPACE STATION 📡👨‍🚀😂
snippet.description: My grandfather built his ham radio setup in 1986 and talked to strangers every night from his garage in Tucson. Last Thanksgiving, I was helping him adjust the antenna when a voice cut through the static. Clear as anything. "This is the ISS, who am I talking to?" Grandpa didn't even flinch. "Frank Delgado, Tucson, Arizona. You're coming in a little scratchy." The astronaut laughed. They talked for four minutes about the weather and Grandpa's tomato garden. NASA later confirmed the contact and sent him a certificate. He framed it next to his original FCC license. Hasn't stopped telling the mailman about it since.

snippet.title: EE. UU. autoriza transacciones con la banca estatal de Venezuela #venezuela   #finanzaspersonales
snippet.description:
EE. UU. autoriza transacciones con la banca estatal de Venezuela
Contexto: En un movimiento clave para la dinámica financiera del país, la Oficina de Control de Activos Extranjeros (OFAC) ha emitido la Licencia General No. 57. Esta medida autoriza oficialmente a instituciones y ciudadanos a realizar servicios y transacciones financieras con entidades que anteriormente estaban restringidas, incluyendo al Banco Central de Venezuela, el Banco de Venezuela, el Banco del Tesoro y el Banco Digital de los Trabajadores.

En una economía donde el 90% de las transacciones ya son digitales y el efectivo es prácticamente una ficción, esta licencia permite regularizar operaciones fundamentales como el pago de nóminas, pensiones, transferencias de fondos, remesas y el uso de tarjetas de débito o crédito. Para el ciudadano común y el sector comercial, esto significa un alivio en la operatividad diaria, facilitando el acceso a servicios bancarios básicos y sistemas de pago electrónico que son el motor actual del comercio nacional.

snippet.title: General Trading License in Dubai 2026 | Cost, Activities & Setup Guide 🇦🇪
snippet.description:
General Trading License in Dubai 2026 | Complete Setup Guide

Planning to start a trading business in Dubai?
In this video, we explain everything you need to know about the General Trading License, including cost, activities, documents, and the setup process.

This license is ideal for businesses that want the flexibility to trade multiple products under one license without applying for separate approvals.

📌 What is a General Trading License?

A General Trading License allows businesses to:

• Import goods
• Export products
• Distribute items
• Trade multiple product categories
• Run wholesale or retail operations

Unlike a standard trading license, this license provides broader flexibility across product categories, making it suitable for multi-product businesses.

📍 Where Can You Get a General Trading License?
You can apply in: Mainland Dubai (DET / DED)
or Free Zones such as:

• RAKEZ
• DMCC
• Meydan Free Zone
• IFZA
• SHAMS

Each jurisdiction has different pricing, visa quotas, and compliance requirements.

💰 Cost of General Trading License in Dubai

Typical investment ranges:

Free Zone:
AED 12,000 – 25,000

Mainland:
AED 18,000 – 30,000

Additional costs may include:

• Visa fees
• Office Ejari
• Bank account setup
• External approvals (if required)

Reality check:
Banking compliance is often the real bottleneck — not licensing.
General trading is considered higher risk by banks due to multi-product exposure.

📦 What Products Can You Trade?

Common product categories:

• Garments & Fashion
• Electronics
• Furniture
• Home Décor
• Stationery
• Food & Beverages (with approval)
• Automobile spare parts
• Machinery

🚫 Products That Require Special Approval

These categories typically require additional regulatory clearance:

• Medicines & Pharmaceuticals
• Tobacco
• Alcohol
• Medical equipment
• Weapons
• Gold & Precious metals

Ignoring this step is one of the fastest ways to delay license approval.

📝 Documents Required

Typical requirements:

• Passport copy
• Visa copy (if resident)
• Passport-size photo
• Proposed company name
• Business activity confirmation
• Office Ejari (for mainland)

⏳ Timeline to Get General Trading License

Standard processing time:

5 to 10 working days

Delays usually occur due to:

Activity clarification
Bank compliance
External approvals
Documentation errors
🎯 Who Should Apply for General Trading License?

This license is suitable for:

• Import-export businesses
• Wholesale traders
• Amazon / Noon sellers
• E-commerce businesses
• International traders
• Multi-product businesses

Anuvi Business Solutions can support you with:

• General Trading License
• Company Formation
• Visa Processing
• Bank Account Assistance
• Compliance & Renewals

snippet.description:
The time has come for us to prepare for 2026 at Georgia State Parks on the Air. We have a new category for 2026, too!
We were asked if a TEAMS category would be possible for those folks that like to operate together, and the GASPOTA team is delivering this year. If you like to work in tandem with your best bud or your spouse, this is the category for you should you choose to accept this mission. The full details are explained in the latest FAQ.
We also changed the more than just the year for several reasons; We changed to the third weekend in April to align our contest with Support Your Parks weekend and to avoid Easter Sunday.
Registration is now open for 2026. Go ahead and start making plans for our fourth annual Georgia State Parks on the Air Contest!
Click on the Rules & Register link in the top horizontal toolbar to see the rules and FAQ and to register for 2026.

snippet.title: BESSENT SAID NO TO RUSSIAN OIL WAIVERS, BUT TREASURY QUIETLY EXTENDED THEM | AMBOS DOS
snippet.description:
AMBOS DOS NOTICIAS
🇺🇸🇷🇺 BESSENT DIJO QUE NO RENOVARÍA LAS EXENCIONES AL PETRÓLEO RUSO, PERO EL TESORO LAS EXTENDIÓ EN SILENCIO

El 15 de abril de 2026, el secretario del Tesoro Scott Bessent declaró en la Casa Blanca que Washington no renovaría las licencias generales para el petróleo ruso e iraní . Dos días después, el 17 de abril, el Departamento del Tesoro emitió la Licencia General 134B, extendiendo silenciosamente el permiso para comprar petróleo ruso hasta el 16 de mayo . La extensión aplica a cargamentos embarcados hasta el 17 de abril y busca estabilizar los precios globales del petróleo tras el cierre del Estrecho de Ormuz por la guerra . La administración no explicó el cambio públicamente.

#AmbosDos #AmbosDosNoticias #Bessent #PetroleoRuso #Sanciones #Hipocresia #Tesoro #Geopolitica


🇺🇸🇷🇺 BESSENT SAID NO TO RUSSIAN OIL WAIVERS, BUT TREASURY QUIETLY EXTENDED THEM

On April 15, 2026, Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent declared at the White House that the US would not renew general licenses for Russian and Iranian oil . Two days later, on April 17, the Treasury Department issued General License 134B, quietly extending permission to buy Russian oil until May 16 . The extension applies to cargoes loaded through April 17 and aims to stabilize global oil prices following the closure of the Strait of Hormuz due to the war . The administration did not publicly explain the reversal.

#AmbosDos #AmbosDosNoticias #Bessent #RussianOil #Sanctions #Hypocrisy #Treasury #Geopolitics

We bring to you the best videos from your favorite show Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah. So, get your daily dose of laughter with Jethalal, Taarak Mehta, Daya, Champaklal and their neighbors in Gokuldham Society.

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
--------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired from the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story revolves around daily happenings in "Gokuldham Co-operative Society" and covers topical issues which are socially relevant. The show predominantly - revolves around 'Jethalal' who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta', is his neighbor. 'Jethalal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' and a mischievous son 'Tapu'. Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalal' to call his father 'Champaklal' from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalal.

snippet.title: How to Get Your Ham Radio License in 2026 (Complete Beginner’s Guide)
snippet.description:
Thinking about getting into ham radio? Here's everything you need to know about the Technician and General class licenses — what they are, what they let you do, and how to get both in 2026.

In this video, I cover:

- What ham radio actually is (and how it's different from FRS/GMRS)
- The three license classes: Technician, General, and Amateur Extra
- The two exams — what to expect, how to pass, how much it costs
- How to take both exams in one afternoon for $15
- What happens after you pass (your call sign, your first radio)
- How to get started without spending a fortune

Whether you're just curious about ham radio or ready to start studying, this video gives you the full roadmap.

snippet.title: US Won’t Renew Iranian, Russian Oil Waivers, Bessent Says
snippet.description:
Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said the US would not renew the general license on Russian oil and the general license on Iranian oil. #iran #russia #worldnews #politics #trump #usa #israel 

The disruption of crude flows through the Strait of Hormuz has caused oil prices to spike and is imposing a heavy toll on US allies in Asia.

Global crude prices are up more than 30% since the war began, with futures trading around $95 a barrel as the US and Iran consider a two-week ceasefire extension.

snippet.title: "I Went to the UK's Biggest Radio Rally as a Total Beginner (Here's What I Found)"
snippet.description:
I went to what's claimed to be one of the UK's biggest amateur radio rallies — the NARS Rally at the Norbreck Castle Hotel in Blackpool — and I didn't understand half of it. Here's my honest beginner's walkthrough of the gear, the community, and everything I learned.From CB radio to PMR, Yaesu to Icom, preppers to Freemasons (yes, really) — this rally had it all. And if you've ever been curious about the amateur radio hobby but don't know where to start, this video is for YOU.📻 I'm still very much on my amateur radio journey — working towards my Foundation Licence and learning as I go. Come along for the ride!

⏱️ CHAPTERS
00:00 Introduction
00:05 Arriving at Norbreck Castle — the NARS Radio Rally
01:03 What I'm hoping to learn today
02:26 Already being recognised by the community!
03:00 Entering the exhibition — first impressions
04:39 Finding the Foundation Licence Manual
05:21 Preppers & amateur radio — what's the link?
07:09 Yaesu, Icom & brands I'm starting to recognise
07:35 Surplus gear & bargain stall hunting
09:27 South Manchester Radio Club & what are "nets"?
10:14 The terminology problem (online vs on air!)
12:01 Did I buy the wrong aerial? My Retevis dilemma
12:22 Wait… the Freemasons are here?!
13:09 British Amateur Television Club & pirate TV nostalgia
16:35 Icom — incredible kit, out of my price range!
22:43 Morse code is still very much alive
28:13 Being honest with you about Parkinson's & learning
32:48 Final thoughts from the beach
